user.title: Mathlin Booking System
user.description: Enter the URL of your Scout Group website. The booking plugin must be installed and active.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the website. Check the URL and try again.
error.plugin_not_found: Connected to the website but the booking plugin API was not found. Make sure the Mathlin Booking plugin is installed and active.
error.invalid_url: That doesn't look like a valid URL.

init.title: Booking Automation Timing
init.description: Configure how many minutes before and after each booking the automation events fire.

data_description.pre_event_minutes: Fire the 'booking_start' event this many minutes before the booking begins. Use this to pre-heat the hall, turn on lights, etc. (0 = fire exactly at start time)
data_description.post_event_minutes: Fire the 'booking_end' event this many minutes after the booking finishes. Use this to turn off heating, lights, etc. (0 = fire exactly at end time)
